report.summary: F&G holds at 9 (Extreme Fear) — BTC consolidating ~$67,078 on Good Friday. Since v14: Publish cycle ran — 5 new crypto-cards/loans pages promoted (732 total published). Production still FROZEN at e3f63fc — 47th escalation. Queue near-empty (2 blocked pages). Market flat but stablecoin dry powder at $316B ATH signals accumulation potential.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA v14 → v15: 1 agent ran since last standup — Publish (16:18) promoted 5 crypto-cards/crypto-loans pages. No build, community, design, or EOD cycle this window.

BTC: ~$67,078 (+0.3% from v14's $66,900). Good Friday — traditional markets closed, crypto volume thin (~$19-24B). Narrow $66,900-$67,200 range. $67K acting as 2026's strongest support level — every dip below quickly reclaimed.

F&G: Holds at 9 (Extreme Fear). Sub-10 for 3rd consecutive day. Historically, sub-10 readings cluster around COVID crash (Mar 2020), China mining ban (May 2021), Terra-Luna (Jun 2022). <20 trading days below 10 in F&G history — we're in rare territory.

PUBLISH (16:18): 5 pages promoted — card-comparison-tool, cashback-calculator, liquidation-price-calculator, bitpay-vs-crypto-com, coinbase-card-vs-gemini-card. QA: 5/5 H1 + breadcrumbs, 2/5 metadata, 0/5 JSON-LD. Total published: 732 (up from 729).

MACRO: April catalyst calendar loading — CLARITY Act roundtable Apr 16 (12 days), token unlocks >$600M this month. Stablecoin supply $316B ATH = record dry powder. Goldman Sachs signaling possible April recovery window.

SEARCH DEMAND: Extreme fear = elevated intent for crisis content — 'buy the dip', 'DCA calculator', 'crypto crash', 'is crypto dead'. Our DCA calculator, passive income guides, and fear/greed explainers are high-value pages right now.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel Analytics. Market data from web search.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE OUTPUT: 1 agent since v14. Publish delivered 5 new pages (crypto-cards/loans calculators and comparisons). No regressions.
TODAY'S TOTAL (from report files): 30 agent runs (standup×11, eod×7, publish×8, community×3, design×1). This is the 15th standup version today.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 732 (up from 729 at v14). +5 from latest publish cycle. +8 since v12 morning.

QUEUE STATUS: Still 2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE (monad-guide, zora-attention-markets-guide-2026), both blocked on missing page.tsx. Queue effectively exhausted — publish cycles now pulling from unpublished-with-page.tsx pool (~610 pages).
METADATA GAP: Latest 5 published pages — 3 missing generateMetadata, all 5 missing JSON-LD structured data. Accumulating SEO debt on newer pages.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (47th ESCALATION): Production frozen at e3f63fc since Apr 2. Now 732 published slugs but only ~199 visible to Google (pre-freeze snapshot). 533+ pages invisible during peak fear-driven search demand. Every hour = irreversible lost indexing time.
P1 — TS ERRORS: 141 errors in 4 files (lido-v3 94, structured-data 40, crypto-arbitrage 4, rwa-yield 3). Non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors but growing tech debt.
P2 — SCAFFOLD 2 QUEUE PAGES: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets-guide-2026 need page.tsx.
P3 — METADATA CLEANUP: Batch add generateMetadata + JSON-LD to recently published pages missing them.
BLOCKERS: Deploy authorization remains sole blocker. All work accumulates in staging.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0, 47th ESCALATION): F&G at 9 for 3rd day. This is a once-in-years sentiment extreme. Search demand for crisis/accumulation content is peaking. 533+ pages sitting invisible while the highest-intent queries of 2026 are firing. Deploy cost: $0. Deploy ROI: compounds hourly. This is now the single highest-leverage action available.

PRIORITY 2 — METADATA + JSON-LD BATCH: Last 5 published pages missing structured data. Before next deploy, batch-add generateMetadata and JSON-LD to all recently promoted pages. This ensures when deploy finally happens, pages are search-optimized from day one.
PRIORITY 3 — SCAFFOLD MONAD + ZORA: Clear the publish queue to zero. Quick scaffold of page.tsx for both blocked pages. Low effort, high signal (pipeline completion).
